productName: Nano Doozies - Blackberry Punch 3:1 CHILL 10 Pk (80g) (300mg CBN;100mg THC)
description: Small-batch sweet, ripe blackberry gummies with a jewel-soft bite, slow-poured like artisan pâte de fruit and dusted with a delicate sugar sparkle for that perfect candy-shop finish. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest in a 3:1 ratio. Made to help you relax and find your calm.
